# Granularity methods <span class="badge badge-draft1">✎ Very rough draft</span>

```{r}
#| include: false
if(file.exists("../_setup.R")){source("../_setup.R")}
```

## GRIM and MER

- GRIM (Granularity-Related Inconsistency of Means) test
- MER (Mean Equality Rounding) test
- Power considerations
- False positive rates

## GRIM-U

- Extensions and variants of the GRIM test
